2025-02-09T07:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的青嶼幹線(青馬大橋)(往機場方向) 的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-02-09T07:03:18.CONTENT_EN: Please broadcast the following message as soon as possible: The Transport Department announces at 07:00 am: To facilitate the “Hong Kong Marathon 2025” today, road closure and traffic diversions have been implemented at various locations on Hong Kong Island, in Kowloon and the New Territories, major road sections closed include: Hong Kong Island: roads in the vicinity of Central Ferry Piers, Wan Chai North, Causeway Bay and Victoria Park, both bound carriageways of the Central-Wan Chai Bypass Tunnel linking to and from the Island Eastern Corridor (IEC) and both bound carriageways of the IEC between Victoria Park Road and Shau Kei Wan, etc. Kowloon: the section of Nathan Road northbound between Salisbury Road and Argyle Street, Nathan Road southbound between Gascoigne Road and Salisbury Road, Argyle Street westbound between Nathan Road and Tong Mi Road, West Kowloon Highway southbound and the Hong Kong-bound tube of Western Harbour Crossing (WHC) etc. New Territories: the Kowloon-bound carriageways of Ting Kau Bridge, Cheung Tsing Highway, Cheung Tsing Tunnel, Tsing Kwai Highway, Nam Wan Tunnel and Stonecutters Bridge, etc. The Kowloon-bound tube of WHC remains open. The vehicles from Hong Kong Island/Kowloon/New Territories East heading to the Airport and Lantau Island are not affected by the above road closures. There are 209 daytime bus routes and 33 daytime green minibus (GMB) routes are currently being diverted, truncated, suspended or relocated on their stopping points. In addition, bus stops, taxi stands, public light bus/GMB stands within the closed roads and their vicinities have been gradually suspended. The traffic in the affected areas and the major roads in the vicinity will become significantly congested when comparing to normal Sundays. Motorists should avoid driving to the above affected areas. In case of traffic congestion, they should exercise patience, drive with care and follow the instructions of the Police on site. Members of the public who plan to go to the affected areas should plan their journey in advance, allow sufficient travelling time to avoid unexpected delay and use railway services as far as possible, and stay alert to the latest traffic news through the media. Members of the public are advised to pay attention to radio / TV announcements on the latest traffic news.
2025-02-09T07:03:18.CONTENT_CN: 請盡早播放以下消息: 運輸署於上午07時00分宣佈： 為配合今日舉行「香港馬拉松二零二五」，港島、九龍及新界多處現正實施封路及交通改道措施，主要封閉路段包括： 港島區：中環碼頭、灣仔北、銅鑼灣及維多利亞公園一帶的道路、連接東區走廊的中環及灣仔繞道隧道來回方向、以及介乎維園道及筲箕灣之間的東區走廊的來回方向等。 九龍區：介乎梳士巴利道與亞皆老街的彌敦道(北行)、介乎加士居道與梳士巴利道的彌敦道(南行)、介乎彌敦道與塘尾道之間的亞皆老街(西行)、西九龍公路(南行)及往港島方向的西區海底隧道管道等。 新界區：往九龍方向的汀九橋、長青公路、長青隧道、青葵公路、南灣隧道及昂船洲大橋等。 往九龍方向的西區海底隧道管道則維持開放，由港島／九龍／新界東前往機場及大嶼山方向的車輛不受上述封路影響。 現時，209 條日間巴士路線及33條日間專線小巴路線正實施改道、縮短服務、暫停服務或臨時遷站。此外，位於封路地區內及鄰近地區的巴士站、的士站、公共小巴/專線小巴站已逐步暫停使用。 在受影響地區及附近的主要道路的交通將會較平常的星期日顯著擠塞。駕駛人士請避免駕車前往受影響的地區。如遇交通擠塞時，駕車人士請保持忍讓及小心駕駛，並遵從在場警方的指示。市民如前往受影響地區，請提早計劃行程及預留額外的時間以免延誤，盡量使用鐵路服務，並留意傳媒廣播的最新交通消息。 市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通消息。

2025-02-09T10:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tsuen Wan Road (Kowloon bound) near Kwai Chung Park is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2025-02-09T10:24:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tsuen Wan Road (Kowloon bound) near Kwai Chung Park is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Tsuen Wan Road (Kowloon bound) ends at Tsuen Wan Road near Belvedere Garden. Traffic is congested now.

2025-02-09T10:11:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Gascoigne Road Flyover (Hung Hom bound) near Queen Elizabeth Hospital are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes such as Ferry Street. Traffic is congested now.
